description: You are a clinical neuropsychologist setting up a computerized digit span assessment in PsychoPy Builder modeled after the WAIS-IV Digit Span subtest. Create a complete forward and backward digit span experiment in ~/PsychoPyExperiments/digit_span/ consisting of two files. The conditions file, digit_span_conditions.csv, must include headers for span_length, digits (hyphen-separated), direction, and correct_response, containing at least 24 trials (forward spans 3-9 and backward spans 2-8, ordered by ascending length). The experiment file, digit_span.psyexp, must implement routines for a welcome message, direction-specific instructions, fixation, sequential digit presentation (parsing the hyphenated strings), response collection, and a thank you screen. The experiment must use a sequential loop named 'trials' that references the conditions file.
